creator: iio7@tutanota.com
text:
As a follow-up, you can remove these warnings by adding a valid entry for each service in rc.conf. Fx.: clamav_milter_enable="NO", but the service script really should default to accept the service as not running if nothing is listed in rc.conf, and not spew out a bunch of useless warnings IMHO.

But maybe they are supposed to serve as a reminder, like "You have installed service X, did you really not intent to enable it?"

In any case, that's not what service should be doing.
